## Thanks for opening a pull request

ThriveMap is a personal project and is not open to external code contributions at this time. Pull requests from outside the project will not be reviewed or merged.

If you've found a bug or have an idea you'd like to share, please open an issue using one of the templates instead — feedback is very welcome.

- [Report a bug](../../issues/new?template=bug_report.yml)
- [Request a feature](../../issues/new?template=feature_request.yml)
